plurals.name: settings_config_import_restored_settings
plurals.item: 已恢复应用设置 %1$d 项

plurals.name: settings_config_import_restored_listen_together
plurals.item: 已恢复一起听设置 %1$d 项

plurals.name: settings_config_import_restored_auth
plurals.item: 已恢复登录状态 %1$d 项

plurals.name: settings_config_import_restored_sync
plurals.item: 已恢复同步配置 %1$d 项

plurals.name: settings_download_directory_migrated
plurals.item: 已迁移 %1$d 个下载文件并切换目录

plurals.name: settings_download_directory_migrated_partial
plurals.item: 已迁移 %1$d 个文件，但有 %2$d 个旧文件未能删除

plurals.name: settings_download_directory_migrate_failed
plurals.item: 有 %1$d 个文件迁移失败，已保留原下载目录

plurals.name: listen_together_notice_controller_offline
plurals.item: 房主当前离线，如果大约 %1$d 分钟内没有重连，房间会自动关闭
